# Wizzy Addon — https://wizzyaddon.com

> Free Meteor Client addon for Minecraft Java 1.21.11 and DonutSMP. Full deepslate bypass, 90+ modules, and a direct .jar download.

## Primary pages

- Home / download: https://wizzyaddon.com/
- Install guide: https://wizzyaddon.com/install
- DonutSMP guide: https://wizzyaddon.com/donutsmp-guide
- Module list: https://wizzyaddon.com/modules
- Blog: https://wizzyaddon.com/posts

## Target topics

## Download

Tracked download URL (increments counter, redirects to GitHub .jar): https://wizzyaddon.com/download

File: WizzyAddon1.21.11.jar · Fabric 1.21.11 · requires Meteor Client
